title: P-12 Academic and Community Services Director
notes: MCPS (Missoula County Public Schools) - large unified district covering both Missoula Elem and HS. Frank leads Academic & Community Services (curriculum/instruction P-12). District operates Jefferson Center Early Learning preschool (Trailblazer 4). Best ECE-curriculum decision-maker.

title: Deputy Superintendent of Instruction
notes: BSD7 unified Bozeman district. Dr. Marilyn H. King is the Deputy Superintendent for Instruction (oversees curriculum/PreK). Email inferred from district pattern first.last@bsd7.org; ZoomInfo confirms m***@bsd7.org. District has Bozeman Reads Early Learning Center at Morning Star Elementary.

title: Elementary Assistant Superintendent (Curriculum Director)
notes: Alberts is Elementary Assistant Superintendent overseeing K-5 curriculum; also referenced as Curriculum Director in 2024-25 board docs. Best ECE/elementary curriculum decision-maker. Superintendent of district is Rex Weltz.

title: Director of Student Achievement - Instructional Programs
notes: BSD44 unified district. Johnston oversees curriculum, Title 1-4 federal grants, ELL, MT Gifted/Talented, and Indian Education for All. Best ECE/curriculum decision-maker at the district.

title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Columbia Falls School District 6 (unified). McCord oversees curriculum and instruction K-12. Email inferred from district pattern first-initial+lastname@cfmtschools.net. Superintendent is Cory Dziowgo.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: Havre Public Schools - Assistant Superintendent Brad Moore is the curriculum/instruction lead under Superintendent Brian Gum. Domain is havrek12.org based on district pattern. Smaller unified district covers Havre Elem + HS.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small Elem-only district (~450 students K-8); no dedicated curriculum director. Shipman is the curriculum/ECE decision-maker as superintendent. Was previously Dillon Middle School principal 14 years.

title: Superintendent
notes: Flaten took over as Superintendent July 2024 (replaced Wade Sundby). Small district - super is the curriculum decision-maker. Confirmed email from LinkedIn/news.

title: Superintendent
notes: Small PK-8 Elem district (~424 students). Super is the curriculum/ECE decision-maker. Shares joint board with Powell County HS.

title: Superintendent
notes: Unified K-12 (~706 students, 3 schools). Super is curriculum lead. Confirmed email from district site.

title: Superintendent
notes: Konen took over after Dave Thennis left for Hamilton. Konen has prior experience as Curriculum Director, Principal, and Superintendent in multiple MT districts. Strong ECE/curriculum decision-maker. Note district domain is stevensville.k12.mt.us (not stevensvilleschools.org).

title: Superintendent
notes: Walsh resigned effective end of 2025-26 school year; new super Ryan Rettig starts July 1, 2026. For current outreach, Walsh remains active. Small K-12 unified district (3 schools).

title: Superintendent
notes: Small unified district (Troy Elem + HS share super). Confirmed email from district staff page. Elementary Principal: Andrea Cummings (acummings@troyk12.org).

title: Superintendent

title: Superintendent

title: Superintendent
notes: Confirmed email from district website. Small district - super is the curriculum decision-maker. K-12 Principal is Courtney Bake.
